name: AWS Security Hub Enabled
description: AWS Security Hub should be enabled in all regions to provide centralized security findings and compliance checks
remediation: Enable AWS Security Hub in all active regions. Use: aws securityhub enable-security-hub --region <region>
remediation_steps: Navigate to Security Hub in AWS Console
Review and accept the service-linked role
Enable desired security standards (CIS, AWS Foundational)
Repeat for all active regions or use AWS Organizations integration
